description: The perfect way to complement your casual wear is to slip into these comfy slipper from catwalk. The cushioned footbed and straps ensure maximum comfort, while the TPU outsole lends traction to every step you take. Upper denim and farbric thong style straps Soft plastic toe separator Denim flower at the axis of the slipper Synthetic leather lining on the straps for durability and style Denim footbed Outsole Durable TPU outsole with hexagonal grooves for grip and traction Raised heel with hexagonal grooves for ergonomic comfort and style Slipper care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
